name: epfms-monorepo
description: Run all Node microservices from one terminal

scripts.install:node-services: npm install --prefix backend/services/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/services/user-service && npm install --prefix backend/services/notification-service && npm install --prefix backend/services/api-gateway && npm install --prefix backend/services/performance-review-service && npm install --prefix backend/services/feedback-service && npm install --prefix backend/services/analytics-service && npm install --prefix backend/services/ai-insights-service
scripts.start:node: concurrently -k -n auth,user,notify,gateway,perf,fb,analytics,ai -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,blueBright,whiteBright,gray "npm run start --prefix backend/services/auth-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/services/user-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/services/notification-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/services/api-gateway" "npm run start --prefix backend/services/performance-review-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/services/feedback-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/services/analytics-service" "npm run start --prefix backend/services/ai-insights-service"
scripts.dev:node: concurrently -k -n auth,user,notify,gateway,perf,fb,analytics,ai -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,blueBright,whiteBright,gray "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/user-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/performance-review-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/feedback-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/analytics-service" "npm run dev --prefix backend/services/ai-insights-service"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c magenta,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
